scenario.name: No STYLEGUIDE.md; bootstrap drafts one, human approves, workflow continues

final_local.goal: Write a getting-started guide for a brand-new project that has no documentation yet.
final_local.styleguide:
# Styleguide (drafted by agent)
- Voice: second person, active.
- Tone: terse.
- Headings: sentence case.
- Files: kebab-case.
final_local.intent: type: tutorial; scope: one page; audience: new user.
